data.epi_content:
The woman lifted me up from where I was slumped in front of the mirror and dressed me in the plain white clothes she had been holding. Then she carried me on her back and began taking me to the room the Crown Prince had mentioned.

"...Can't I... not go?"

"You can't, dear. We don't need thoughts or judgments of our own. When His Highness speaks, we simply bow our heads and listen to everything he says. That's what we were born for."

Despite saying these words with her own mouth, the woman's face showed she didn't believe a word of it. If nothing else, the area around her eyes was distorted to an unsettling degree.

After carrying me for quite some time, she stopped in front of a room and spoke softly.

"Still, child, don't let them break you. I'm already broken. Everyone who could have saved me has fallen to heaven or hell. So if there's even one person left who cares about you, don't break for their sake. His Highness is a peculiar man who always seeks consent before doing things. Though I'm not sure what happens when he's displeased."

Her muttered words that followed were particularly intense: "When someone came to save me, I was already in the arms of that cursed man."

She opened the door and entered. The room was ordinary except for two large bookshelves, three drawers, a bed, and several hooks hanging from the ceiling. Then again, I suppose I would be just an ordinary noblewoman if you excluded my misfortune—though saying "excluded" doesn't mean much.

The Crown Prince was leaning against the wall, smoking tobacco while still wearing his school uniform.

"Tionem, put her on the bed and return to the garden."

The woman nodded without answering, placed me on the bed, and left the room again.

"You must be quite hungry after not eating for so long?"

I didn't answer. The Crown Prince didn't seem particularly interested in getting a response anyway, as he trudged toward me with a hose attached to the ceiling. And what he did next was simply madness.

As if I were a goose being prepared for foie gras, he shoved the hose down my throat and began forcing some unknown substance into me.

"Just four days of this feed, and your skeletal body will return to normal—it's that nutritious. I hope you eat with gratitude."

He stuffed my stomach so full of feed that I thought it might burst. I began to feel a burning sensation where my stomach was, as if it had ruptured.

The Crown Prince, seemingly unwilling to give me any rest, pulled out the hose and began forcing water down my throat. It was agonizing.

"This is exhausting no matter when I do it. I'll have to find someone to do this starting tomorrow."

"Uweeeek!"

"Disgusting."

Having gone without food for so long, my stomach rebelled against the sudden influx of cold water and strange feed. I began vomiting, blood mixed with the contents.
data.epi_content2:
Even though my body was deteriorating, it would heal quickly, which was maddening.

Though I knew escape was impossible, I desperately wanted to get out of there. I got up and tried to run toward the door we had just entered. The Crown Prince grabbed me by the hair and slammed me to the floor. He seized me as I lay face down, fingers twitching, and began tying me up.

Like meat hanging in a butcher shop, he bound my limbs together in the center and hung me from the ceiling with my head pointing downward. He placed a ring around my neck so that if I leaned forward, I would choke, but if I relaxed and leaned backward, my arms felt like they would dislocate.

"Who was it again? Evan. Yes, Evan of House Strelitz. I don't know how he managed to hide his power, but after you disappeared, he's been running around like a dog, desperately searching for you."

As he spoke, the Crown Prince pulled out a pistol from his waist. It was that pistol with ivory grip and gleaming gold decorations that my father had given me. Seeing what I had considered my soul's companion in the hands of the most detestable person made something like flames rise in my mind.

I tried to lunge at him, but then remembered I was hanging from the ceiling, no different from livestock awaiting slaughter.

"Anyway, within the Academy, a mere student sacrificed four teachers and twenty-nine students. The injured number over two hundred. Yes, a mere student."

Bang!

A bullet burrowed into my thigh. The pain made me want to retch again, but the Crown Prince approached and shoved a large ball into my mouth, similar to what I had worn when locked in the white room. I don't know what spell was engraved on it, but it shrank to fit my mouth as it entered.

"Originally, I should keep you locked up in the room of contemplation for half a year with minimal food... that would make things much easier..."

Suddenly he stopped mid-sentence and began trembling.

"Why did you have to pull that dog shit while I was attending?!"

He started firing his gun at me like a madman, creating five more holes in my side.

"He said if I handed you over, he would stop hiding and offering people as sacrifices."

Hearing this, I tried to laugh mockingly at the Crown Prince, but only gurgled as blood spilled from my mouth. Then I remembered I couldn't speak anyway because of the gag.

"Right, I just need to hand you over. He didn't say you had to be in good condition."

When pulling the trigger no longer produced bullets, he threw the pistol at my head and waved his hand toward the shadows, ordering them to heal me. Simultaneously, the bullets inside my body popped out and the wounds began to close.

"I said I would become the greatest tyrant in history. I also said the Empire would fall in my generation. Damn it, it's about to collapse before I even inherit it!"

He approached and removed the ball from my mouth, about to throw it away in disgust, when I bit his finger. With my strength completely drained, I only managed to tear a bit of skin rather than biting off his finger. Instead, he pushed his bitten finger deeper into my mouth, making me gag.

"Whew, I need to calm down. Calm down."

He stared at me for a long time before turning and leaving the room. As painful as this was, it was better than being locked in that soft room with no stimulation. I had been half out of my mind in there.
data.epi_content3:
...

"This isn't right, aaaaargh!"

Perhaps because I had eaten yesterday, my throat was quite capable of screaming.

Johannes had said he would send people to feed me, but instead he sent Blacks. And not just any Blacks—one-armed ones with only their left hands. Such creatures are useless. After just a month, they can't meet production quotas and are best used as examples to be killed.

Yet these vermin looked at my wretched state with pity.

"Don't look at me like that, you fucking beasts. Before I cut off that one arm you have left."

Hearing this, the Blacks suddenly frowned and began muttering something about Mecklenburg in their language. They lowered me from the ceiling and untied the ropes around my hands and feet. I tried to run to the door on trembling legs, but of course it wouldn't open.

They didn't seem interested in catching me. After all, there was no way I could escape this room.

Being treated like a toy by mere Blacks. They looked at my pathetic state and chattered among themselves, snickering.

"Come here, Mecklenburg."

"Don't use human language, you Black bastard. Squeal like pigs or cows, you lowly creatures."

"She doesn't understand."

After saying this, the two Blacks exchanged some sounds between themselves, then approached and grabbed me. When I struggled and resisted, one struck my face with his blunt arm. The other made some noise as if saying that was too harsh, mentioning something about Mecklenburg, and the first one nodded with an uncertain expression before kicking me.

Then, sighing at me as I lay fallen, they took the hose hanging from the ceiling, forcibly opened my mouth, and began shoving food into it.

"The woman who treated us like livestock is now living worse than livestock."

"Fuck off. Once I get out of here, I'll chop you all into pieces and feed you to pigs. As for Johannes, that madman, I'll burn him and throw him to the dogs."

They mocked me, laughing that I had completely lost my mind, and left the room. Then the woman with dull eyes came to find me, moved me to the bathroom to wash me, and locked me in that room again.

This routine repeated itself. Morning, noon, and evening, the Blacks would beat me, feed me, and occasionally taunt or torture me. Something about how with breasts like mine, I would have been mistaken for a man in their tribe. Damn Black bastards. If Evan gets me out of here, I'll pull out all their teeth and fill their stomachs with the same feed they give me until they burst and die.

But when will he rescue me? The Crown Prince hasn't visited in quite some time. The woman doesn't say anything to me, and when I tried to ask the Blacks something, one of them pointed at his crotch as if offering to sell me spring, so I punched him in the balls. I got beaten badly afterward.

It's hard to endure. Three months have passed.

Evan, save me.
